testsuite.name: agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManagerTest

testcase.name: save and restore checkpoint round-trips correctly
multiple checkpoints for same workflow are independent
listCheckpoints returns all checkpoints for a workflow

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:27.626 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results) 08:31:27.626 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Deleted checkpoint cp-1 08:31:27.627 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (1 task results) 08:31:27.631 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (1 task results) 08:31:27.631 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-2 for workflow wf-1 (2 task results) 08:31:27.633 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results) 08:31:27.633 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-2 for workflow wf-2 (0 task results) 08:31:27.633 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Deleted checkpoint cp-1 08:31:27.634 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results) 08:31:27.634 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-2 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results) 08:31:27.634 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-3 for workflow wf-2 (0 task results)
